overview: Princeton Hormone & Weight Loss provides medical weight loss using customized prescription medications and hormone replacement therapy (testosterone, estrogen, progesterone) in various delivery forms to address hormonal and metabolic weight gain.
highlights: Customized prescription compound and standard medications for weight loss
Hormone replacement in multiple delivery forms (oral, injectables, topicals)
targetAudience: People with menopause, andropause, or weight management concerns related to hormonal imbalances.
